## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the [Code Rules](../CONTRIBUTING.md#code-rules) (no console.log, parameterised SQL, try/catch)
- [ ] All API responses use `utils/response.js` helpers
- [ ] New endpoints have at least one test
- [ ] No `TODO` comments left in code (opened Issue instead)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars were added
- [ ] README / docs updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format
